name: Sharpshooter's Oath
description: This superior bow once belonged to a master archer. However, it gives off a strong scent, thus making it unsuitable for hunting.

description.r1: Increases DMG against weak spots by __24%__.
description.r2: Increases DMG against weak spots by __30%__.
description.r3: Increases DMG against weak spots by __36%__.
description.r4: Increases DMG against weak spots by __42%__.
description.r5: Increases DMG against weak spots by __48%__.
